homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a correct caption to not have any information absent from the audio. Use the worst score if all the information in the caption is absent from the audio, and use the best score if all the information in the caption is present in the audio.
prompts.1: How complete is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a complete caption to have all relevant information concerning genre, mood, and instrumentation of the audio. Use the worst score if the caption does not have any relevant information on these aspects for the audio, and the best score if the caption contains all relevant information on these aspects for the audio.

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This electronic dance track features a male vocalist singing in a distinct robotic style that drives the urban atmosphere. Supported by a drum machine and synth bass, the fast tempo creates an energetic mood perfect for a club or party setting.

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic instrumental track blends strong electronic influences with a driving, fast-paced rhythm centered on synthesizers and a drum machine. While the beat creates an intense, dark atmosphere suitable for a nightclub or rave setting, the overall mood leans towards a party vibe rather than pure industrial tension. The repetitive structure maintains high momentum throughout, making it a dance-focused piece designed to be immersive in a club environment.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track delivers a heavy, grunge sound driven by a fuzzy, distorted bass guitar riff and aggressive drumming. Although the music carries a dark and intense mood suitable for horror media, its rhythmic energy aligns more closely with metal than the dubstep tag suggests in some automated analyses. The composition serves as an atmospheric backdrop that could effectively underscore scenes in video games or film soundtracks.

questions.name: Sample 11
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track by Kamil Muzyk delivers an upbeat and energetic atmosphere driven by a steady drum machine beat and a simple bassline. A repetitive synth lead melody creates a strong retro feel that evokes nostalgia, making the music ideal for lively video game soundtracks. Although cymbals and mallet percussion are detected, the core sound remains defined by its synthesizer textures and dance-oriented rhythm.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
